data_science.title: Known By Their Actions: Fingerprinting LLM Browser Agents via UI Traces
data_science.why_trending: Reveals critical security vulnerability in LLM-based agents through passive UI tracking, achieving 96% F1 across frontier models—directly relevant to deployed agent trustworthiness.

data_science.title: GPart: End-to-End Isometric Fine-Tuning via Global Parameter Partitioning
data_science.why_trending: Addresses fundamental limitation in LoRA fine-tuning by achieving end-to-end isometry in parameter space, advancing parameter-efficient LLM adaptation at scale.

data_science.title: XFP: Quality-Targeted Adaptive Codebook Quantization with Sparse Outlier Separation for LLM Inference
data_science.why_trending: Introduces quality-targeted dynamic quantization for LLM inference with automatic hyperparameter selection, enabling practical sub-byte compression without calibration.

data_science.title: GFMate: Empowering Graph Foundation Models with Test-time Prompt Tuning
data_science.why_trending: Extends graph prompt tuning to foundation models with test-time adaptation, improving generalization across domains—key for scaling GFMs.

data_science.title: From Sycophantic Consensus to Pluralistic Repair: Why AI Alignment Must Surface Disagreement
data_science.why_trending: Reframes AI alignment beyond preference aggregation to surface genuine disagreement and pluralism, addressing critical limitation of current RLHF approaches.

finance.title: Yield Curves Dynamics Using Variational Autoencoders Under No-arbitrage
finance.why_trending: Integrates physics-informed constraints (no-arbitrage) into deep generative models for yield curves, resolving 'manifold collapse' and achieving consistent term structure forecasting.

finance.title: Vector-Quantized Discrete Latent Factors Meet Financial Priors: Dynamic Cross-Sectional Stock Ranking Prediction for Portfolio Construction
finance.why_trending: Combines expert financial priors with vector-quantized discrete latent factors for dynamic cross-sectional stock ranking, balancing interpretability and predictive power.

finance.title: Synthetic American Option Pricing via Jump-HMM-Driven Heston Implied Volatility
finance.why_trending: Breaks circular dependency in synthetic option pricing by deriving implied volatility from structural models, enabling synthetic data generation for ML/risk applications.

finance.title: Bayesian Dynamic Modeling of Realized Volatility in Financial Asset Price Forecasting
finance.why_trending: Introduces dynamic gamma process models for realized volatility in Bayesian framework, improving volatility forecasting through integration of high-frequency data.

finance.title: A deep learning approach for pricing convertible bonds with path-dependent reset and call provisions
finance.why_trending: Develops deep learning framework for path-dependent convertible bond pricing under complex contractual features, extending DL methods to realistic derivative valuation.

social_sciences.title: A Practical Guide to Instrumental Variables Methods with Heterogeneous Treatment Effects
social_sciences.why_trending: Provides practical guide to IV methods accounting for heterogeneous treatment effects, aligning empirical econometric practice with recent LATE framework advances.

social_sciences.title: Identification and Estimation of Staggered Difference-in-Differences with Network Spillovers
social_sciences.why_trending: Extends staggered difference-in-differences to settings with network spillovers, enabling policy evaluation under realistic interdependence structures.

social_sciences.title: Deep Learning for Solving and Estimating Dynamic Models in Economics and Finance
social_sciences.why_trending: Comprehensive guide to deep learning for solving high-dimensional heterogeneous-agent and macro-finance models, addressing curse of dimensionality in economic modeling.
topics: Deep learning for dynamic economic models

social_sciences.title: Generative AI Fuels Solo Entrepreneurship, but Teams Still Lead at the Top
social_sciences.why_trending: Documents how generative AI reshapes entrepreneurial entry composition (solo vs. teams) using 160K+ product launches, revealing paradox where entry increases but top quality remains team-driven.

social_sciences.title: Regret Equals Covariance: A Closed-Form Characterization for Stochastic Optimization
social_sciences.why_trending: Proves exact closed-form decomposition of regret as covariance between uncertain parameters and optimal decisions, replacing expensive SAA simulation.

topics.name: LLM efficiency, safety, and adaptation
topics.summary: Papers focused on making large language models more efficient (via parameter-efficient fine-tuning and quantization), more secure (via agent fingerprinting), and more generalizable (via foundation model adaptation). Key concern: scaling LLMs and deploying them safely and efficiently.

topics.name: Neural networks for derivatives pricing and volatility
topics.summary: Integration of deep learning with financial theory (no-arbitrage constraints, structural models, dynamic Bayesian frameworks) for pricing derivatives and forecasting volatility. Addresses the need to combine model flexibility with financial domain constraints.

topics.name: Stock prediction and factor models
topics.summary: Machine learning approaches to cross-sectional stock return prediction that integrate financial priors (factor models, expert domain knowledge) with learned latent factors for improved interpretability and performance.

topics.name: Causal inference and econometric methods
topics.summary: Advances in econometric methodology for causal inference accounting for heterogeneous treatment effects, network spillovers, and functional estimation with proper uniform inference procedures.

topics.name: Deep learning for high-dimensional economic and financial modeling
topics.summary: Computational methods that use deep learning and decision theory to overcome dimensionality constraints in solving heterogeneous-agent economies, macro-finance models, and stochastic optimization problems.

topics.name: Market design, microstructure, and systemic risk
topics.summary: Analysis of prediction markets, perpetual futures, and decentralized exchanges including herding dynamics, market manipulation incentives, microstructure signatures, and risk design frameworks for novel instruments.

topics.name: AI, labor markets, and economic behavior
topics.summary: Studies of how generative AI affects labor supply, entrepreneurial entry, productivity, skill investments, and household economic decisions in contexts of changing technology and market structure.

topics.name: Game theory, mechanism design, and social choice
topics.summary: Theoretical advances in Bayesian persuasion, strategic mechanisms, voting systems, fair allocation, and governance design under information asymmetry and value heterogeneity.

topics.name: Explainability, interpretability, and AI alignment
topics.summary: Methods and frameworks for understanding black-box ML systems (GNNs, deep RL), surfacing disagreement in pluralistic alignment, and distilling policies to interpretable surrogate models.

topics.name: Clustering, data analysis, and statistical methods
topics.summary: Advances in unsupervised and semi-supervised learning including topological clustering refinements, ordinal clustering with interpretability, count-data models, and benchmark studies of imbalanced learning.
